title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say why people might choose to attend these events and what they might get out of the experience.

images.label: A
images.description: A full cinema audience watching an action film in the dark, some with popcorn.

images.label: B
images.description: A huge crowd at an outdoor music festival, with colourful lights and a stage in the background.

images.label: C
images.description: Fans cheering enthusiastically in a packed sports stadium during an exciting match.

followUp.question: Which type of live entertainment do you think is the most popular with young people today? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how media consumption has changed and what might motivate people to consume media in these different ways.

images.label: D
images.description: A young person lying on a sofa watching a TV series on a laptop alone late at night.

images.label: E
images.description: An older couple each reading different printed newspapers at a breakfast table.

images.label: F
images.description: A commuter on a train listening to a podcast through wireless earphones.

followUp.question: Which way of consuming media do you think will still be common in twenty years' time? (Why?)
